subject: Fix K8s CSIT failure in jenkins
commit_message:
Fix K8s CSIT failure in jenkins

Increased the timeout of the readiness container to 15 mins when the pods takes more time to deploy. Restarting the robot pod when error occurs.

Issue-ID: POLICY-4541
Signed-off-by: zrrmmua <ramesh.murugan.iyer@est.tech>
Change-Id: Ib14b7c20e28b76ed19ae74aae6255877b18206af

entries.message:
